title: Oxidizing Copper Durability
description: Copper tools and armor items oxidize as the durability decreases!
body:
A vanilla resource pack that modifies copper tools, brush, and armor items to oxidize as durability decreases.

All copper items oxidize through the four stages of Minecraft oxidation: Normal, Exposed, Weathered, and Oxidized.

**Fully vanilla!** Does **NOT** require Optifine / CIT Resewn!

![Showcase of the durability stages of copper tool and armor items ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ebc6f0665053e87dd99f37cec08ab6de237a653.png)
### List of Oxidizing Items:
- Copper Axe
- Copper Hoe​
- Copper Pickaxe​
- Copper Shovel​
- Copper Sword
- Brush
- Copper Helmet​*
- Copper Chestplate*
- Copper Leggings​*
- Copper Boots​*

*Only item textures oxidize (armor trims supported).

### Upcoming Pack Updates:
- Oxidizing Armor Models (will require a CIT mod)
- Diminishing Copper Tools (better visually distinguish oxidized copper from diamond tools)
